title: Glowing Trim Shield
description: Glowing Trim Shield Pack changes Shield into glowing trim shields 16 colors with 18 trims. this pack works on just re-naming shield and make them glowing version supported from 1.16 to latest.
body:
Glowing Trim Shield Pack

Hello guys!
We meet again 👋

Today, I present to you the Glowing Trim Shield Pack.
This texture pack adds glowing trim designs to shields in Minecraft, giving them a unique and stylish look.

It works smoothly with or without shaders, so anyone can enjoy it across supported versions.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

===📌Read Carefully===

=OptiFine is required
=This pack works by renaming the shield
=Includes:
----16 colors
----18 trim designs
=Applies only to shields
=Just rename the shield to activate effects

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

===🎨Shield Colors===

| Color Name        | Code |
| ----------------- | ---- |
| Amethyst          | a    |
| Copper            | c    |
| Cherry            | ch   |
| Diamond           | d    |
| Emerald           | e    |
| Gold              | g    |
| Iron              | i    |
| Lapis             | l    |
| Netherite         | n    |
| Quartz            | q    |
| Redstone          | r    |
| Resin             | rs   |
| Prismarine        | p    |
| Gilded Blackstone | gb   |
| Magma             | m    |
| Sculk             | s    |

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

===🛡️Trim Designs===

| Design    | Code |
| --------- | ---- |
| Bolt      | 1    |
| Coast     | 2    |
| Dune      | 3    |
| Eye       | 4    |
| Flow      | 5    |
| Host      | 6    |
| Raiser    | 7    |
| Rib       | 8    |
| Sentry    | 9    |
| Shaper    | 10   |
| Silence   | 11   |
| Snout     | 12   |
| Spire     | 13   |
| Tide      | 14   |
| Vex       | 15   |
| Ward      | 16   |
| Wayfinder | 17   |
| Wild      | 18   |

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

===⚙️ How to Use===

Rename your shield using a combination of color + design code.

Examples:  r14 , a10 , l6 , g7 , c4 , d16 , l2 , n9 , i3 , q12, ch18 , rs17, p15, m5, gb6, s10

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

===✨ Changes Applied===

-After applying the pack:

1]Shield appearance
2]GUI

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

===⚠️ OptiFine Settings Required===

=Make sure these options are enabled:
---Emissive Textures
---Custom Items

=Otherwise, the pack may not work properly.
---Without OptiFine, the glowing (emissive) effect may not work, or the entire pack may fail.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

===🔧 Alternative Mods===

=Fabric Mods
---EMF (Entity Model Features)
---ETF (Entity Texture Features)
---Continuity
---CIT Resewn
---Indium

=Forge Mods
---EMF (Entity Model Features)
---ETF (Entity Texture Features)
---Connectedness
---Fusion (Connected Textures)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

===❗ Troubleshooting===

-If the pack works the first time but not after reopening Minecraft, reload the texture pack.
-If it doesn’t work the first time—even after following the steps—check your OptiFine version.
-Make sure OptiFine is installed correctly before using the pack.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

===🌍 Compatibility===

-Works in Singleplayer and Multiplayer
-Supported versions: 1.16 to latest
-Each version has separate files, so check before downloading

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

===🎉 Final Note===

Enjoy the Glowing Trim Shield Pack!

Thanks for downloading ❤️.
